purpose: Machine-loadable SQO execution model. Canonical source of truth for governance stage sequencing, state vocabulary, allowed transitions, and artifact requirements. Must be loaded after any context compaction before SQO work.

CANDIDATE.description: Initial state after derivation. Awaiting operator review.

ACCEPTED.description: Operator accepted the proposition as structurally valid.

REJECTED.description: Operator rejected the proposition as structurally invalid or ungrounded.

CONTESTED.description: Operator disputes the proposition. Requires arbitration.

ARBITRATED.description: Arbitration resolved a contested proposition. Final disposition.

stage_states.NOT_STARTED: Stage has not begun. Prerequisites may or may not be met.
stage_states.IN_PROGRESS: Stage execution underway. Artifacts partially produced.
stage_states.COMPLETE: Stage finished. All required artifacts produced and valid.
stage_states.BLOCKED: Stage cannot proceed. Missing prerequisites or governance hold.
stage_states.DEFERRED: Stage intentionally postponed. Not a failure — a governed decision.

promotion_states.S1: First governed advancement. Full gate traversal proven.
promotion_states.S2: Full qualification. Enrichment, convergence, and revalidation complete.

revalidation_verdicts.PARTIAL: Some checks failed. Gate 4 NOT cleared. Fix required.

anchor_verdicts.CONSTITUTIONAL_DISTANCE_NOMINAL: Candidate corpus is dimensionally comparable to reference. No block.
anchor_verdicts.CONSTITUTIONAL_DISTANCE_ELEVATED: Some dimensions failed but no CRITICAL failures. Operator override permitted.
anchor_verdicts.CONSTITUTIONAL_DISTANCE_CRITICAL: CRITICAL dimensions failed. Advancement blocked. No override.

invalid_transitions.reason: Contested propositions resolve through arbitration only.
Contested propositions resolve through arbitration only.

s0_to_s1.description: Initial governance lifecycle traversal. Proves gates work.

s1_to_s2.description: Full qualification. Enrichment strengthens substrate, re-revalidation confirms, anchor clears all dimensions.

gate_1_ceu_reconciliation.name: CEU Reconciliation
gate_1_ceu_reconciliation.description: Operator confirms, rejects, or merges CEU candidates. Establishes the structural partition that all downstream derivation operates on.

gate_2_proposition_derivation.name: Semantic Proposition Derivation
gate_2_proposition_derivation.description: Derives propositions from structural or evidence substrate. PATH A uses derivation_engine.py (code graph). PATH B uses proposition_bridge.py (SDC/CSR evidence).

gate_3_proposition_review.name: Proposition Review
gate_3_proposition_review.description: Operator reviews candidate propositions. Exercises governance friction: accept, reject, contest, arbitrate. Batch accept-unflagged for non-flagged propositions.
gate_3_proposition_review.completion_condition: proposition_review_state.json status == COMPLETE AND all dispositions terminal
gate_3_proposition_review.naming_rule: Individual actions produce past-participle form: accept→ACCEPTED, reject→REJECTED, contest→CONTESTED, arbitrate→ARBITRATED. Never ACCEPT or REJECT (present tense).

gate_4_revalidation.name: Deterministic Revalidation
gate_4_revalidation.description: 25-check deterministic revalidation across 8 phases. All checks must PASS for gate clearance.

gate_5_promotion.name: Promotion Evaluation
gate_5_promotion.description: Operator evaluates S-level advancement. Constitutional replay anchor runs automatically before advancement. Anchor can block if CRITICAL dimensions fail.
gate_5_promotion.completion_condition: promotion_state.json s_level advanced AND provenance == GOVERNED_LIFECYCLE

enrichment_planning.name: Enrichment Planning
enrichment_planning.description: Identify enrichment targets: weak/DERIVED propositions, confidence gaps, debt items eligible for evidence reduction. Produces enrichment plan specifying which propositions to strengthen and which evidence sources to use.
enrichment_planning.completion_condition: enrichment_plan.json exists with target propositions and evidence sources
enrichment_planning.note: Enrichment plan identifies: propositions with DERIVED tier or low confidence, debt items classified as REDUCIBLE_BY_EVIDENCE or ENRICHABLE, evidence sources available for re-extraction.

evidence_enrichment_execution.name: Evidence Enrichment Execution
evidence_enrichment_execution.description: Execute enrichment against evidence sources. PATH A: code graph authority edges (AST). PATH B: HTML document structure re-extraction (module cards, layers, capability descriptions). Produces enrichment log with per-proposition evidence deltas.
input_artifacts: evidence source files (PATH A: codebase, PATH B: HTML documents)

materializer.note: PATH B materializer exists but is hardcoded to chronicle paths. Needs parameterization (same pattern as proposition_bridge.py before generalization).

evidence_enrichment_execution.completion_condition: enrichment_log.json exists with enrichment events AND enrichment_activity_event.json emitted

debt_reassessment.name: Debt Item Reassessment
debt_reassessment.description: Re-evaluate specimen debt items against enriched propositions. Debt items classified as ENRICHABLE or REDUCIBLE_BY_EVIDENCE may change status. IRREDUCIBLE_STRUCTURAL_ABSENCE items remain unchanged.
debt_reassessment.completion_condition: debt_reassessment.json exists with before/after debt classification

enriched_proposition_update.name: Enriched Proposition Update
enriched_proposition_update.description: Apply enrichment results to propositions. Updates confidence scores, evidence anchors, and derivation tier where enrichment provides stronger grounding. Writes enriched propositions back to semantic_propositions.json.
enriched_proposition_update.completion_condition: enrichment_summary.json exists with proposition count, confidence deltas, tier changes

gate_4_revalidation_post_enrichment.name: Post-Enrichment Revalidation
gate_4_revalidation_post_enrichment.description: Re-run full 25-check revalidation on enriched corpus. Same engine as initial revalidation. Must PASS for S2 advancement.

constitutional_anchor_recheck.name: Constitutional Anchor Re-check
constitutional_anchor_recheck.description: Re-run constitutional replay anchor with enrichment_activity now satisfied. All 8 dimensions must clear (no CRITICAL failures). enrichment_activity dimension should now PASS.
constitutional_anchor_recheck.completion_condition: constitutional_replay_anchor.json advancement_blocked == false AND enrichment_activity == PASS

gate_5_promotion_s2.name: S2 Promotion Evaluation
gate_5_promotion_s2.description: Operator evaluates S1→S2 advancement. Requires: post-enrichment revalidation PASS, constitutional anchor not blocked with enrichment_activity satisfied, operator rationale. S2 authority level is L5.
gate_5_promotion_s2.completion_condition: promotion_state.json s_level == S2 AND provenance == GOVERNED_LIFECYCLE

rehydration_contract.trigger: Context compaction, session resume, or continuation from prior conversation
verification: State vocabulary loaded — disposition names are canonical, not reconstructed
Current S-level identified — S0, S1, or S2?
Current advancement path identified — in S0→S1 or S1→S2 sequence?
If S1: which S1→S2 stage is active? (enrichment_planning through gate_5_promotion_s2)
Allowed transitions known — what can happen next?
Artifact locations known — where are inputs and outputs?
rehydration_contract.hard_rule: No S-state advancement may be evaluated unless SQO_EXECUTION_GRAPH has been loaded and current run state is mapped onto it. The process must know how it advances — not rely on Claude remembering it.
